name: openkhodam
description: An Electron application with React and TypeScript
author: example.com

scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @openkhodam/protocol typecheck && pnpm --filter @openkhodam/client typecheck && pnpm --filter @openkhodam/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @openkhodam/ui typecheck && pnpm --filter @openkhodam/desktop typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @openkhodam/protocol test && pnpm --filter @openkhodam/client test && pnpm --filter @openkhodam/server test
